creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

Replacing ports/textproc/expat2/files/patch-xmlparse.c with this:

http://expat.cvs.sourceforge.net/viewvc/expat/expat/lib/xmlparse.c?r1=1.164&r2=1.167&view=patch

(and fixing the path)

should fix the issue while maintaining the patch for CVE-2009-3560:

http://mail.libexpat.org/pipermail/expat-discuss/2009-December/002648.html

and also fixing an issue reported here:

http://mail.libexpat.org/pipermail/expat-bugs/2010-February/002870.html

A PORTREVISION bump would also be required of course. I'm willing to
help get this committed if desired.

Steve
